song_name: St Elmos Fire Man In Motion

versions.song_name: St Elmos Fire Man In Motion
St Elmos Fire Man In Motion

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: St Elmos Fire Man In Motion

recommended.song_name: Cant Take My Eyes Off You
Cant Take My Eyes Off You

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb/G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Bb/D[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Bb/D[/ch]   [ch]Fsus/Eb[/ch]
Growin' up, you don't see the writing on the wall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Bb/D[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
Passin' by, movin' straight a-head, you knew it all[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]        
But maybe sometime if you feel the pain[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
You'll find you're all alone, everything has changed…[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Bb/D[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Bb/D[/ch]   [ch]Fsus/Eb[/ch]
Play the game, you know you can't quit until it's won[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Bb/D[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
Soldier on, only you can do what must be done[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]        
You know in some way you're a lot like me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Gm7[/ch]                 [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
You're just a prisoner and you're tryin' to break free[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]C2[/ch]             [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I can see the new horizon, underneath the blazin' sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]C2[/ch]         [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I'll be where the eagle's flying higher and higher[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]C2[/ch]              [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Gonna be your man in motion, all I need is a pair of wheels[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]C2[/ch]         [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Take me where my future's lyin', St. Elmo's fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]D7[/ch]    
Oh, oh, oh, ooh, oh-uh-ohh[/tab]

[ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Eb/G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Bb/D[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Bb/D[/ch]   [ch]Fsus/Eb[/ch]
Burning up, don't know just how far that I can go (Just how far I go)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]Bb/D[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
Soon be home, only just a few miles down the road[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]       
I can make it, I know, I can[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Gm[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
You broke the boy in me but you won't break the man[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]C2[/ch]             [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I can see the new horizon, underneath the blazin' sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]C2[/ch]         [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I'll be where the eagle's flying higher and higher[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]C2[/ch]              [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Gonna be your man in motion, all I need is a pair of wheels[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]C2[/ch]         [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Take me where my future's lyin', St. Elmo's fire[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
I can climb the highest mountain, cross the wildest sea[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
I can feel St. Elmo's fire burnin' in me…     burnin' in me[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]Eb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Just once in his life…    a man has his time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
And my time is now…    and I'm coming alive![/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]C2[/ch]            [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I can hear the music playin', I can see the banners fly[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]C2[/ch]          [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Feel like you're back again, and hope ridin' high[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]C2[/ch]              [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Gonna be your man in motion, all I need is a pair of wheels[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]C2[/ch]         [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Take me where the future's lyin', St. Elmo's fire[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]C2[/ch]             [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I can see the new horizon, underneath the blazin' sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]C2[/ch]         [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I'll be where the eagle's flying higher and higher[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]C2[/ch]              [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Gonna be your man in motion, all I need is a pair of wheels[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]C2[/ch]         [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Take me where my future's lyin', St. Elmo's fire[/tab]
[ch]G[/ch]
